scripts.smoke:markdown: node ./src/cli.mjs from-markdown --input ./examples/outline.md --out ./dist/outline.spec.json --title "Existing Content Deck" && node ./src/cli.mjs render --spec ./dist/outline.spec.json --out ./dist/outline.pptx && node ./src/cli.mjs qa --pptx ./dist/outline.pptx --spec ./dist/outline.spec.json --out ./dist/outline.qa.json
scripts.smoke:images: node ./src/cli.mjs from-images --out ./dist/image.spec.json --title "Image First Demo" --images ./examples/sample-visual.svg && node ./src/cli.mjs render --spec ./dist/image.spec.json --out ./dist/image.pptx && node ./src/cli.mjs qa --pptx ./dist/image.pptx --spec ./dist/image.spec.json --out ./dist/image.qa.json
